name: Jeweled Walnut Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. In a large bowl, beat together eggs, sugar, salt, and vanilla.
3. Stir in flour.
4. Mix in half of the gumdrops and walnuts.
5. Turn mixture onto a greased 9-inch square baking pan.
6. Sprinkle with remaining gumdrops and walnuts.
7. Bake for about 35 minutes, or until top has a firm, dull crust.
8. Cool in pan.
9. Cut into 24 bars.
